title: Hex Documentation Static Site Generator
status_note: Orphaned workplan — ADR-2506101449 was never created. Project shifted to Rust; superseded by hex-nexus dashboard for documentation hosting.

steps.description: Define domain models for Document, SiteConfig, Section, and Navigation entities.
steps.done_condition: Domain models are defined and pass type checks.

steps.description: Define ports for DocumentRenderer, SiteCompiler, and DocumentRepository interfaces.
steps.done_condition: Ports are defined and integrated with domain models.

steps.description: Implement secondary adapter for Markdown processing using a library like marked.
steps.done_condition: Markdown processing adapter is implemented and unit tested.

steps.description: Implement secondary adapter for HTML template rendering using a lightweight engine like handlebars.
steps.done_condition: HTML template rendering adapter is implemented and unit tested.

steps.description: Implement secondary adapter for static file generation.
steps.done_condition: Static file generation adapter is implemented and unit tested.

steps.description: Build CLI adapter providing commands for init, build, and serve.
steps.done_condition: CLI commands are implemented and tested.

steps.description: Create MCP server adapter to enable documentation preview from within IDEs.
steps.done_condition: MCP server adapter is implemented and integrated with CLI.

steps.description: Create use case to orchestrate the compilation pipeline (validate → render → assemble → output).
steps.done_condition: Compilation pipeline use case is implemented and tested.

steps.description: Dogfood the generator to build hex's own documentation site, validating the architecture and user experience.
steps.done_condition: Hex documentation site is successfully built and feedback is gathered.

riskRegister.mitigation: Plan and scope features properly to avoid scope creep.
riskRegister.risk: Initial overhead in building a fully-featured static site generator

riskRegister.mitigation: Establish clear ownership and update strategy for dependencies.

successCriteria: Documentation generator successfully compiles documentation site.
User experience is validated through dogfooding.
Documentation format is consistent across hex projects.
